news.title: Adobe & Dollar General earnings, housing & labor data: What to Watch
news.summary: Asking for a Trend host Josh Lipton takes a look at the top stories for investors to watch on Thursday, Mar. 12. Dollar General (DG), Dick's Sporting Goods (DKS), Adobe (ADBE), and Ulta (ULTA) are all reporting quarterly earnings results. Fresh housing data is on deck, with the latest weekly mortgage rates, housing starts, and building permits. Initial jobless claims are out in the morning, with economists expecting a slight uptick. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Asking for a Trend.

news.title: TD Cowen Maintains Hold on Adobe, Lowers Price Target to $325
news.summary: TD Cowen  analyst Derrick Wood   maintains Adobe (NASDAQ:ADBE) with a Hold and lowers the price target from $400 to $325.

news.title: Is Adobe (ADBE) Now An Opportunity After A 36.6% One Year Share Price Fall?
news.summary: If you are wondering whether Adobe's recent share price puts it in bargain territory or if the story is more complicated, this article is for you. Adobe's stock closed at US$275.13, with returns of 1.5% over 7 days and 2.5% over 30 days, while year to date the return is a 17.5% decline and over 1 year the return is a 36.6% decline, framing a very different picture to the shorter term moves. Recent headlines around Adobe have focused on its position in creative software and digital media...

news.title: Adobe Stock Drops As Analyst Cuts Target On Growth Concerns
news.summary: Adobe Inc (NASDAQ:ADBE) shares are dropping on Tuesday after TD Cowen cut its price target on the creative‑software leader to $325 from $400.
